finding: PAPER/SHADOW evidence accumulation had hard PASS/BLOCKED gates, but it did not expose a deterministic deficit vector telling the operator which non-live evidence dimension is next: PAPER samples, SHADOW samples, reason/cost evidence, paired windows, span, or validated runtime source binding.
acceptance_conditions: paper_shadow_evidence_accumulation_report carries actionability version, status, primary deficit, next action, and numeric deficits
validator recomputes actionability fields and blocks drift even when the evidence hash is recomputed
scorecard input ready remains PAPER-only until paired windows, span, and actual runtime source evidence pass
validated long-run review readiness remains non-live and does not write LIVE_READY
open contract gap count remains 13 and all live/scale flags remain false
